requirement_topic.en: SOMELEC Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz and Weak-Grid Constraints
requirement_topic.zh: SOMELEC并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及弱电网约束
requirement_topic.zht: SOMELEC併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及弱電網約束

summary.en: Mauritania's public electricity supply is understood to use a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz baseline, with SOMELEC as the national electricity utility and ARE as the electricity-sector regulator. For EV charger projects, no public Mauritania-specific EVSE grid code was confirmed as of 2026-06-14. Practical approval should therefore be treated as project-specific: available site capacity, transformer loading, metering, protection settings, harmonic limits, earthing, commissioning, and operator responsibility must be agreed with SOMELEC, ARE, the site owner, and any tender authority. Grid deficits, low electrification outside main urban corridors, and remote Sahara locations can make public charging impractical without dedicated power supply planning.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚公共供电通常理解为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz基线，SOMELEC为国家电力公司，ARE为电力行业监管机构。截至2026年6月14日，尚未确认公开发布的毛里塔尼亚专门EVSE并网规范。因此，充电桩项目审批应按项目处理：可用场站容量、变压器负荷、计量、保护定值、谐波限值、接地、调试和运营责任须与SOMELEC、ARE、场地方及任何招标机构确认。电网缺口、主要城市走廊以外较低的电气化水平以及撒哈拉偏远地点，可能在没有专门供电规划的情况下使公共充电不具可行性。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞公共供電通常理解為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz基線，SOMELEC為國家電力公司，ARE為電力行業監管機構。截至2026年6月14日，尚未確認公開發布的茅利塔尼亞專門EVSE併網規範。因此，充電樁項目審批應按項目處理：可用場站容量、變壓器負荷、計量、保護定值、諧波限值、接地、調試和營運責任須與SOMELEC、ARE、場地方及任何招標機構確認。電網缺口、主要城市走廊以外較低的電氣化水平以及撒哈拉偏遠地點，可能在沒有專門供電規劃的情況下使公共充電不具可行性。

standards_or_laws: SOMELEC project connection and utility acceptance requirements (verify current project procedure)
ARE electricity-sector regulatory approval or licensing requirements (verify current scope)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are designed around a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication, and local Chinese grid-operator project acceptance. The nominal voltage and frequency baseline is close to Mauritania's stated supply, but China domestic grid acceptance does not address Mauritania site capacity, weak-grid voltage variation, protection coordination, utility metering, or operation in hot and dusty desert conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装以220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信以及中国本地电网运营商项目验收为基线。名义电压和频率与毛里塔尼亚供电相近，但中国国内并网验收不能覆盖毛里塔尼亚场站容量、弱电网电压波动、保护配合、公共事业计量或高温多尘沙漠条件下运行。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝以220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊以及中國本地電網運營商項目驗收為基線。名義電壓和頻率與茅利塔尼亞供電相近，但中國國內併網驗收不能覆蓋茅利塔尼亞場站容量、弱電網電壓波動、保護配合、公共事業計量或高溫多塵沙漠條件下運行。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: The voltage label may look familiar, but Mauritania readiness requires a site-level electrical study. Exporters should confirm utility capacity, transformer and feeder loading, earthing system, residual-current and overcurrent protection, harmonic emissions, power-factor behavior, voltage sag tolerance, metering, remote monitoring, commissioning procedure, and responsibility for maintenance during outages. For remote or low-electrification sites, a charger may need dedicated transformer capacity, solar-plus-storage support, generator backup, or a smaller AC-only configuration rather than a DC fast charger.
gap.zh: 电压标称值看似相近，但面向毛里塔尼亚的准备工作需要场站级电气研究。出口商应确认公共事业容量、变压器和馈线负荷、接地系统、剩余电流和过流保护、谐波发射、功率因数表现、电压暂降耐受、计量、远程监控、调试程序以及停电期间维护责任。对于偏远或低电气化场站，充电桩可能需要专用变压器容量、光储支持、发电机备份，或采用较小的仅交流配置，而不是直流快充。
gap.zht: 電壓標稱值看似相近，但面向茅利塔尼亞的準備工作需要場站級電氣研究。出口商應確認公共事業容量、變壓器和饋線負荷、接地系統、剩餘電流和過流保護、諧波發射、功率因數表現、電壓暫降耐受、計量、遠程監控、調試程序以及停電期間維護責任。對於偏遠或低電氣化場站，充電樁可能需要專用變壓器容量、光儲支持、發電機備份，或採用較小的僅交流配置，而不是直流快充。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific mandatory gate — grid-connected EVSE must be coordinated with SOMELEC and any ARE licensing or approval route; no public Mauritania EVSE-specific grid code was confirmed as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a SOMELEC or ARE approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Mauritania grid connection as a project-specific utility study, not a simple 220/380 V nameplate match. Confirm SOMELEC capacity and ARE obligations before specifying DC fast charging, especially outside strong urban feeders.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将毛里塔尼亚并网视为项目专属公共事业研究，而不是简单的220/380 V铭牌匹配。在指定直流快充前，尤其是在强城市馈线以外，应确认SOMELEC容量和ARE义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將茅利塔尼亞併網視為項目專屬公共事業研究，而不是簡單的220/380 V銘牌匹配。在指定直流快充前，尤其是在強城市饋線以外，應確認SOMELEC容量和ARE義務。
